hero.subtitle: A dedicated guide for watercolor artists. Search thousands of paints by pigment code or brand to uncover their true characteristics, compare alternatives, and build your perfect palette.

features.title: Signal-Rich Search
features.description: Filter by opacity, granulation, staining, and lightfastness to pinpoint the right paint.

features.title: Side-by-Side Compare
features.description: Compare swatches and performance notes across multiple paints at once.

features.title: Pigment Atlas
features.description: Navigate pigment families and discover how brands interpret the same codes.

featured.title: Featured Colors
featured.subtitle: Newly mapped paints added to the growing TintMap collection.
